forecastingEngine

Path: lib/forecastingEngine.ts

Purpose

Step 9 — Forecasting Engine.

Exports

  • forecastNext (function) — Step 9 — Forecasting Engine. Forecasted sales, predicted ROAS, required clicks for revenue, break-even CPC, inventory re
  • forecastPeriods (function) — Step 9 — Forecasting Engine. Forecasted sales, predicted ROAS, required clicks for revenue, break-even CPC, inventory re
  • predictedRoas (function) — Step 9 — Forecasting Engine. Forecasted sales, predicted ROAS, required clicks for revenue, break-even CPC, inventory re
  • requiredClicksForRevenue (function) — Step 9 — Forecasting Engine. Forecasted sales, predicted ROAS, required clicks for revenue, break-even CPC, inventory re
  • breakEvenCpc (function) — Step 9 — Forecasting Engine. Forecasted sales, predicted ROAS, required clicks for revenue, break-even CPC, inventory re
  • reorderPoint (function) — Step 9 — Forecasting Engine. Forecasted sales, predicted ROAS, required clicks for revenue, break-even CPC, inventory re
